# FreeSWITCH Windows/Linux Build Triage Template

## 1. Build Target
- Platform:
- Configuration:
- Entry command:
- Scope:

## 2. First Blocking Error
- File:
- Toolchain:
- Error / warning code:
- Exact symptom:

## 3. Local Hypothesis
- Suspected root cause:
- Why this code path controls the failure:
- Cheapest discriminating validation:

## 4. Fix
- Files changed:
- Change summary:
- Why this is the minimal safe fix:

## 5. Validation
- Re-run command:
- Result:
- Next blocker, if any:
